summary: Book remains 100% cash (0 positions per broker_state.json), so all live risk is on the buy side: radar's #1 candidate BOLD is a distressed reverse-merger leaving pre-merger holders ~3.7% of the combined entity, and newly-checked #4 candidate BJDX has an explicit going-concern warning with a Chapter 7 liquidation disclosure and a fresh $23.7M private-placement/warrant-wall dilution overhang.

flags.why: Radar top candidate (5.11) but this is a distressed reverse-merger pop, not organic strength: definitive Serapha Bio merger agreement (6/22-6/23) plus $230M concurrent private placement leaves pre-merger Boundless holders only ~3.7% of combined 'Serapha Bio' (Nasdaq: AATD); own oncology pipeline halted, ~75% workforce cut. No new filing found this cycle - assessment unchanged from last snapshot, still matches intel.json's own avoid warning.

Radar #4 candidate (3.15, well below the 6.25 buy threshold) but flagged here for when/if score rises: 10-Q discloses substantial doubt about going-concern status including possible Chapter 7 liquidation, cash was down to $3.7M at Q1-2026 end (runway only to Q3-2026 pre-raise). Company just closed a $23.7M private placement ($8.5M upfront + up to $15.2M via Series G warrant exercise) - extends runway into Q1-2027 but creates a warrant-overhang dilution setup. FinBERT flagged a cash-runway headline for this ticker today, which is what prompted this check.

Radar #2 candidate (5.93) but carries a live $100M ATM (since 2024) plus a Feb-2026 $100M underwritten offering (20M shares at $5.00) now underwater at ~$3.75 - financing overhang persists even though today's move is BLA-filing/insider-buy driven. No new 8-K or offering filing found this cycle.

Automatic S-3ASR shelf effective 1/13/26, already used twice via 424B5, plus an active $50M ATM - ongoing drip-dilution setup. Currently well below buy threshold (3.33 vs 6.25) so moot for now; re-check if score rises.

dilution_watch.note: Definitive Serapha Bio merger plus $230M concurrent private placement; existing holders diluted to ~3.7% pro forma, combined entity to trade as 'AATD'.
$23.7M private placement ($8.5M upfront, up to $15.2M via Series G warrants); going-concern disclosure in most recent 10-Q; pre-raise cash was $3.7M with runway only to Q3-2026.
$107.6M net underwritten offering (20M shares at $5.00), now underwater; $100M ATM (since 2024) remains active. No new filing found this cycle.
Automatic shelf effective, used twice via 424B5; $50M ATM active. Below buy threshold currently.

disagreements: No substantive disagreement with intel.json this cycle - its BOLD warning matches our critical flag, and intel raised no conviction boosts on dilution-risk names. BJDX (going-concern/warrant-wall critical risk) is not mentioned in intel.json at all; worth intel picking it up given FinBERT already flagged its cash-runway headline today.
